summary.title: Summary
summary.content: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable backend systems, IoT platforms, and distributed microservices. Expert in Node.js, TypeScript, and Golang with deep proficiency in GraphQL, gRPC, and event-driven architectures. Proven track record of building high-availability systems serving millions of devices and users daily. Strong DevOps background including Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Terraform), and cloud platforms (GCP, AWS).

items.description:
• Architected and maintained IoT traffic handling infrastructure processing millions of connected HVAC device events daily across global markets
  • Designed device connectivity, access-control, and traffic-forwarding pipelines enabling end-users to monitor and control devices in real time via mobile application
  • Built high-throughput MQTT message routing using EMQX broker and an in-house MQTTSn broker for constrained IoT devices
  • Managed microservices deployment and orchestration on Kubernetes within a Jenkins-based CI/CD environment
  • Delivered initial device provisioning and onboarding workflows, reducing manual setup overhead for large-scale device fleets

Stack: Node.js, TypeScript, RabbitMQ, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, EMQX, MQTTSn, Kubernetes, Docker, Jenkins

• Developed and maintained backend services for a rapid grocery delivery platform operating with a 15–25 minute delivery SLA
  • Built real-time order status tracking using WebSockets, improving customer transparency during fulfillment
  • Implemented inventory and catalog search APIs with Elasticsearch, enabling fast full-text and faceted product discovery
  • Automated deployment and release workflows with GitHub Actions, reducing manual release steps and improving deployment reliability
  • Integrated Golang microservices (Echo) for performance-critical order-processing paths alongside the Node.js services

Stack: Node.js, Express.js, Golang, Echo, TypeScript, JavaScript, MariaDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, WebSockets, GitHub Actions

• Contributed to backend services for Sweden's largest beauty and health booking platform serving 4M+ monthly consumers and 20,000+ connected specialists
  • Developed geolocation-based search features using Elasticsearch, improving specialist discovery accuracy across the country
  • Implemented asynchronous job processing with Amazon SQS to handle high-volume booking workflows without blocking the request lifecycle
  • Managed containerized services on Amazon ECS/ECR with CircleCI automated deployment pipelines

Stack: Node.js, Express.js, MySQL, Redis, Amazon SQS, Elasticsearch, Amazon ECS, Amazon ECR, CircleCI, Lerna, Jira

• Built backend services for a crypto copy-trading platform enabling investors to automatically mirror trades from experienced traders
  • Designed and implemented a trading strategy execution engine in Golang for low-latency, high-frequency financial operations
  • Integrated with multiple cryptocurrency exchange APIs to support real-time trade execution and portfolio synchronization
  • Managed microservices infrastructure with Docker Swarm and applied GitOps practices for reproducible, auditable deployments

Stack: Golang, Gin, Echo, Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Express.js, NestJS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Redis, Docker Swarm, React, Next.js, GitLab, GitHub

• Engineered a high-performance meal-plan generation service in Golang capable of producing 7–40 day personalized plans from a large recipe database based on user caloric goals
  • Extracted meal-plan computation into an independent microservice, significantly reducing latency for the main application under high load
  • Built mobile backend APIs supporting barcode scanning, food tracking, weight logging, and personalized goal management
  • Integrated Google and Facebook OAuth for secure user authentication across web and mobile clients

Stack: Golang, Gin, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, React.js, React Native, Redux, Saga, Firebase, Git, GitLab

• Developed backend services for a global financial and quantitative analytics platform with real-time data ingestion and visualization
  • Built gRPC-based Golang microservices for high-performance, strongly typed inter-service communication
  • Managed cloud infrastructure on GCP/GKE with Kubernetes, enabling scalable and resilient deployment of data pipeline components
  • Implemented event-driven data processing architecture using RabbitMQ, decoupling producers from consumers for improved system resilience
  • Integrated Auth0 for enterprise-grade identity and access management across platform services

Stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Golang, Echo, gRPC, Viper, Express.js, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Kubernetes, GCP, GKE, CircleCI, React, Auth0, Jira

• Built a full-stack intercity bus ticketing system including a REST backend, a passenger web app, a driver mobile app, and a dispatcher admin panel
  • Developed real-time seat reservation and booking management using Socket.io, ensuring no double-booking under concurrent load
  • Created cross-platform mobile applications for drivers (NativeScript/Angular) and passengers (Xamarin.Android/C#)
  • Implemented role-based access control across four distinct user types: passenger, driver, dispatcher, and administrator

Stack: Golang, Gin, Node.js, Sails.js, MongoDB, Redis, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6), Angular (v2-v5), NativeScript, Angular Material, Socket.io, C#, Xamarin.Android, Bash, GitLab
